_comment: Example Claude-Code settings.json hooks fragment. JSON has no comments, so notes live in _comment keys (Claude Code ignores unknown keys). Merge the hooks block into your own settings.json.

SessionStart._comment: Print the behavior layer into context at the start of every session. The simplest portable form is to cat / Get-Content the file. On Windows, emit no-BOM UTF-8 so non-ASCII echoes safely (a leading BOM can corrupt the first injected line).

hooks._comment_PreToolUse: A PreToolUse command hook can validate a tool argument against an allowlist and BLOCK the call (exit non-zero) before it runs — e.g. guarding a tag / label set so only an approved vocabulary is ever written. Point its command at your own validator script. Shown here as a commented pattern, not active.
